title: 🧮 Chaos Matrices
name: Chaos Matrices
what_it_is: Matrix-based chaos generation—used in control theory, population dynamics, or rendering multiple dimensions of chaos at once.

his gaze projects a chaos grid—vision that sees in multidimensional unpredictability
